pkgmetadata.longdescription: cloud-utils is a collection of utilities for interacting with cloud instances and their disk images. It provides guest-side tools such as ec2metadata (query the instance metadata service), growpart (grow a partition to fill the available space) and vcs-run, as well as host-side image manipulation tools such as cloud-localds (build a NoCloud seed image), mount-image-callback, resize-part-image and write-mime-multipart.

use.flag: Installs utilities useful within a guest VM
Installs utilities useful for manipulating guest images from outside a guest VM
